title: Create: Jukebox Displays
description: Adds the Jukebox as a display source for use with Create Display Links.
body:
I made this mod because I wanted to make a now playing board but the Jukebox is not a display source in vanilla Create.

### Display Modes
> **Current Song** - Displays the full song title and artist (Artist - Title)
> 
> **Song Title** - Displays only the song title
> 
> **Artist Name** - Displays only the song artist
>
> **Short Elapsed Time** - The amount of time the Jukebox has been playing the current track, formatted as `mm:ss`
>
> **Long Elapsed Time** - The amount of time the Jukebox has been playing the current track, formatted as `m minutes s seconds`

**Note**: Display links update in 5 second intervals. This means the elapsed time readings will always be in increments of 5 seconds.
